prompt:
Instagram square 1:1 promo graphic for the Muha Members giveaway points challenge.

Reference 1 is the LOCKED VISUAL STYLE TARGET — match its exact look: pure deep black background with a red-tinted nighttime Miami / Vice City skyline + dark palm tree silhouettes + neon red glow, atmospheric haze. Gold MM monogram with decorative crown-flourish styling. Gold five-point stars as ornaments. Cream-and-gold thin double horizontal divider lines around eyebrow text. Massive cream/gold letterpress display HEADLINE typography (heavy slab serif/display with subtle italic, letterpress texture, warm-gold glow). Styled disclaimer at bottom flanked by gold stars. Same dramatic Vice City cinematic mood as reference 1.

LAYOUT (top to bottom, with generous breathing room between sections):

1) TOP (~7% from top): MM gold monogram (reference 3) horizontally centered, sized ~18% of canvas width.

2) Row of small gold stars beneath the monogram.

3) EYEBROW LINE (~17% from top) between two thin cream double-divider lines: "MUHA MEMBERS // POINTS CHALLENGE" tracked-out cream caps with letterpress texture.

4) MAIN HEADLINE (~22-32% from top): two-line stacked "EARN / POINTS" in massive cream/gold letterpress display caps (matching reference 1's headline typography), tightly stacked, generous letterspacing, warm-gold glow halo. Each line spans ~60% canvas width centered.

5) SUB-INSTRUCTION (~35% from top, between headline and card): one line of cream tracked-out caps reading "POST & SHARE YOUR MUHA CARD TO EARN" — small but readable, ~50% canvas width centered, letterpress texture, warm gold tint.

6) HERO CARD (~40-62% from top): display the GTA Muha card from reference 2, centered horizontally, sized to span ~75% of canvas width, gently tilted ~4° clockwise for dynamism, with a soft warm red glow behind it on the background. Render the card PIXEL-FAITHFUL to reference 2 (red Challenger + $25,000 CASH PRIZE side on the left, encrypted ticket / scanner side on the right).

7) TWO REWARD CALLOUT PILLS (~70-85% from top) — STACKED VERTICALLY, one on top of the other (NOT side-by-side), each a wider pill spanning ~70% of canvas width:
   - TOP PILL: a single horizontal line of cream caps text inside a thin red rounded-rectangle outline pill with soft red glow: "POST CARD TO STORY  →  +50 POINTS" — the action text on the left, an arrow, then the points on the right.
   - BOTTOM PILL: same style: "SHARE CARD WITH A FRIEND  →  +100 POINTS".
   Generous letterspacing. Both pills clearly different actions with clear point rewards.

8) BOTTOM (~92% from top): row of small gold five-point stars + the styled disclaimer "✦  SEE OFFICIAL RULES IN APP OR AT MUHAMEMBERS.COM  ✦" in tracked cream caps with letterpress texture, matching reference 1's disclaimer style exactly.

Style: match reference 1 PRECISELY — same GTA Vice City key-art cinematic vibe, same color palette (deep black + red Miami glow + cream/gold typography), same letterpress display headlines, same dark moody atmosphere, same star ornaments, same divider lines, same disclaimer treatment.

Critical: the two action pills are STACKED vertically (one above the other), NOT side-by-side. The single-line copy on each pill makes the action crystal clear.

Negative: do NOT use side-by-side pills, do NOT have the two pills break to multiple lines (each pill is a single line of text with the action on the left and the points reward on the right), do not lighten the background, do not use modern minimal sans-serif (use the locked slab/display letterpress style from reference 1), do not omit the red Miami glow / palm silhouettes / skyline atmosphere, do not warp the MM logo, do not omit the gold stars, do not change the card's design, no extra logos.
